name: Polly Penguin
description: Polly Penguin is a community-driven meme token on Solana, created to bring Pengu’s girl where she truly belongs—on the same chain as her love. Rooted in the massively popular Pudgyverse culture, Polly represents connection, fun, and on-chain community energy, all wrapped in a lighthearted, playful meme narrative focused on sharing, vibes, creativity, and a community-first spirit. Built by fans, for fans.Always community first.
